title: lithocarpus edulis
intro: Lithocarpus edulis, also known as the Bur Oak or Canyon Live Oak, is a type of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus edulis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
